name: AI Tested Before Deployment
description: AI systems are tested and validated before deployment in the provision of investment services.
rationale: ESMA ¶11/13/21: firms should conduct regular AI model testing; implement comprehensive testing and monitoring; and thorough testing of algorithms and their outcomes for accuracy, fairness and reliability.
source: ESMA Public Statement ESMA35-335435667-5924 — On the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the provision of retail investment services (30 May 2024), mapping AI use onto MiFID II obligations.
